hero_headline_am: ልጆቻችን ሕይወት ውስጥ አስደናቂ ጊዜ እንፈጥራለን
hero_headline_en: We Put a Little Magic Into All Our Kids' Lives
hero_subtext_am: ካሲና ኪድስ ለ7–11 ዓመት ህፃናት የተዘጋጁ መጽሐፍት፣ ቪዲዮዎች እና የእውቀት እድገት ሀብቶችን ያቀርባል — ደስታ እና ጉጉት ለምያጎለብቱ።
hero_subtext_en: Kassina Kids brings together storybooks, videos, and cognitive development resources for children ages 7–11 — sparking joy and curiosity at every turn.
prog1_desc_am: ህፃናት ችግር ፈቺ ሆነው እንዲያስቡ የሚያበረታቱ ታሪኮች እና ተግባራት።
prog1_desc_en: Stories and activities that encourage children to think like problem-solvers and innovators.
prog2_desc_am: ውብ ምስሎች ያሏቸው የህፃናት መጽሐፍት — ለማንበብ እና ለማዳመጥ።
prog2_desc_en: Beautifully illustrated children's books — perfect for reading aloud and independent reading.
prog3_desc_am: ቀልጣፋ እና ትምህርታዊ ቪዲዮዎች ለህፃናት እና ወላጆች።
prog3_desc_en: Fun and educational videos for children and parents to enjoy together.
